lines.speaker: Wealthy citizen
lines.text: Hello. How are you liking the city?

lines.speaker: Wealthy citizen
lines.text: I'd recommend the Colosseum. Me and a few associates always wager bets on the contenders.

lines.speaker: Wealthy citizen
lines.text: As you can tell, I'm doing quite well winning! Plenty of coin to pass around.

lines.speaker: Wealthy citizen
lines.text: No! We don't care for begging in the city!
